summary: Comprehensive testing of CRM iteration 5 - All 14 features tested and verified. Backend: 22/22 pytest tests passed. Frontend: All UI features verified via Playwright.

issues: Console warning: chart dimensions -1x-1 (minor styling issue with Recharts but doesn't affect functionality)

authentication: Login works for kunalkapadia2212@gmail.com with Admin2468!!!
Login works for kunal.dadarwala22@gmail.com with Admin2468!!!
global_search: Search bar visible in header (desktop view)
Search with 1 character returns empty results
Search with 2+ characters returns clients and cases
Search results dropdown shows clients section and cases section
notifications: Notification bell shows count badge (5 items visible)
Notifications include: title, description, severity, link
delete_client: Delete client works without 'admin authority needed' error
Client deleted successfully with confirmation dialog
clients_dashboard: Table columns: Client Name, Email, Phone, Postcode, Income, Employment, Lead Source, Created
Removed columns: Loan Amount, Property Price, Case Status, LTV
add_client_form: Form has: First Name, Last Name, Email, Phone, DOB, Postcode, Current Address, Income, Employment Type, Lead Source
Form does NOT have: Security Address, Property Price, Loan Amount, Deposit
client_detail_additional_applicants: 'Add Additional Applicant' button visible on client detail page
Add Applicant dialog has: Full Name, Date of Birth, Email, Phone fields
Applicants can be added and removed via API
cases_page_tabs: Mortgage tab exists with case count
Insurance tab exists with case count
Mortgage tab shows: Client, Type, Lender, Loan Amount, Property Value, Status, Commission, Expiry
Property Value column exists in Mortgage tab
new_case_form: Client search shows results when typing
insurance_fields_in_case_form: Type of Cover dropdown (Level Term/Decreasing Term/Increasing Term/Whole of Life)
case_search: Cases can be searched by client name
task_automation: Setting case status to review_due creates automatic task

seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up during pytest runs (TEST_ prefixed clients)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 14 requested features verified working. Global search returns clients/cases with 2+ chars. Notification bell shows count and dropdown with overdue tasks/expiring products. Delete client works without permission error. Client dashboard simplified to basic columns only. Add Client form has NO Security Address/Property Price/Loan Amount/Deposit fields. Client detail has Add Additional Applicant functionality. Cases page has Mortgage/Insurance tabs. New Case form has searchable client and dynamic Mortgage/Insurance fields. Both user logins work correctly.

verification_summary.notification_bell: PASS - Shows count badge and dropdown with tasks/products
